name: Philadelphia Housing Development Corporation
description_short: Philadelphia Housing Development Corporation is a free credit assistance provider based in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. Rated 2.8/5 with 56 Google reviews, reflecting limited customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Philadelphia Housing Development Corporation is a free credit assistance provider serving clients in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. Carrying a 2.8/5.0 Google rating from 56 reviews, Philadelphia Housing Development Corporation has an limited reputation among consumers in the Philadelphia area looking to access free credit counseling and financial guidance.

Operating as a department of housing, housing development, Philadelphia Housing Development Corporation provides a range of services for consumers seeking free credit assistance solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

Non-profit and free credit assistance providers in Philadelphia offer valuable resources for consumers who need help but may not be able to afford paid services. Philadelphia Housing Development Corporation provides an important community service, and consumers should verify the organization's non-profit status and HUD-approval where applicable. Free counseling sessions can be a good starting point before committing to paid credit repair or debt relief programs.

Consumers in the Philadelphia, Pennsylvania area who are considering Philadelphia Housing Development Corporation should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any free credit assistance provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
